title: What is my virtual wallet and where can I see the balance?
bodyHtml:
Your wallet, displayed under the ‘Money’ section of your Back Office, shows the real-time total of your sales earnings on Back Market that haven’t been paid to you yet.
On the same page, you can also view a schedule of your upcoming payouts.

 

Now, payouts are sent by Back Market every Wednesday. 

 

Each payout covers all sales made and shipped during the previous days. In practical terms, if we call your most recent payout day as D, the amount paid includes the net amounts for the orders shipped between D-14 and D-8. The next payout, which will be sent on D+7, will include the net amounts for the orders placed between D-7 and D-1, and so on.

 

 

To check your wallet balance, you need to follow these steps:

 

  1. Log in to your Back Office
  2. Go to ‘Money’ page
  3. Select the ‘Your wallet’ section
  4. See ‘Your wallet balance’

In the top-left box, labeled ‘Your wallet balance’, you can see the total accumulated amount per currency. In the middle box, named ‘Upcoming payouts’, there’s a breakdown of the payments due to you from Back Market over the next two payout cycles.

In the right-hand box, you can see the amount of the deposit currently held by Back Market.

 

 

Deferred payouts appear in your wallet as well. For more information on the deferred payout, please check out the dedicated What's a deferred payout? article.
